name: @speajus/markdown-to-pdf
description: A new project created with Intent by Augment.

scripts.build:pdfkit: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p=require('path'),{execSync:e}=require('child_process'),d=p.join('node_modules','pdfkit','js');if(!fs.existsSync(d)){const t='/tmp/pdfkit-build-'+Date.now();e('git clone --depth 1 --branch support-color-emoji-google https://github.com/jspears/pdfkit.git '+t,{stdio:'inherit'});const pd=p.resolve('node_modules/pdfkit');for(const f of['lib','rollup.config.js','.babelrc','yarn.lock']){const s=p.join(t,f);if(fs.existsSync(s)){e('cp -r '+s+' '+pd,{stdio:'inherit'})}}e('cd '+pd+' && npm install --ignore-scripts && npx rollup -c',{stdio:'inherit'});e('rm -rf '+t,{stdio:'inherit'})}"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "if(require('fs').existsSync('src')){require('child_process').execSync('npm run build:pdfkit',{stdio:'inherit'})}" || true && node scripts/patch-fontkit-colr.js
scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/fonts && cp src/fonts/* dist/fonts/
scripts.test: tsx --test test/*.test.ts && tsx samples/generate.ts && pnpm run readme
